overview: Fire Elemental is a Normal-class Spirit/Elemental monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 40 HP, 0 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack1 at 0% ratio (0 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (0%), Range Attack2 (0%), Action Attack3 (0%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Ice
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
